expected: Twilio deletes closed subaccounts 30 days after closure.
instantly provisioned via Twilio console or number provisioning API

live_gates.summary: Phase 0 external-readiness chain is still withheld.
live_gates.reason: Current baseline verdict remains withheld, so no live telephony mutation may start.

live_gates.summary: The target vendor must be one of the task 031 telephony shortlist entries.
live_gates.reason: Shortlist exists, but a live target vendor has not been selected for mutation.

live_gates.summary: Owner and backup owner roles are already defined for telephony accounts and numbers.
live_gates.reason: Task 023 established owner and backup-owner roles for telephony secrets and number ranges.

live_gates.summary: Webhook base URLs, signature validation, replay defense, and endpoint mapping must be explicit.
live_gates.reason: The pack defines the model, but no live callback base URL or vault-backed secret set is yet approved.

live_gates.summary: Recording retention, transcript floor, and missing-recording posture must be reviewed.
live_gates.reason: The retention and evidence-readiness model is defined but not approved for a real vendor environment.

live_gates.summary: Spend authority and procurement posture must be explicit before account or number creation.
live_gates.reason: Both shortlisted vendors make number creation a commercial action.

live_gates.summary: A named approver is required before any real mutation path.
live_gates.reason: No named approver is currently bound to the telephony lane.

live_gates.summary: The target environment must be explicit and not inferred from provider defaults.
live_gates.reason: The pack supports provider-like preprod and production, but no live target is approved.

live_gates.summary: Live mutation and spend flags remain false by default.
live_gates.reason: Real provider mutation stays fail-closed until explicit env gates are true.

live_gates.summary: Current real account and number creation posture is blocked.
live_gates.reason: The local lab is ready now, but live account creation remains blocked until all gates pass.
live_gates.required_evidence: All prior gates plus final governance acknowledgement.
